reviews.review_description:
I got this game a few days ago, and I was immediately hooked. The mixed reality is impressive, all the elements are unique, and co-location is very accurate/fun.
I joined the discord server and contacted the developer, very quick reply and friendly. I also made a promo for the game that is free to use here. > http://youtube.com/watch?v=oFr2NGTVgxs
If you stumbled onto this game by mistake, what are you waiting for? Get it now!
Fun but there are invisable things that make the obsticals invisable

reviews.review_title: I Feel Like I’m in Ninja Warrior
reviews.review_description: The mechanics in this are absolutely awesome. Nothing feels better than mission impossible sliding under a laser or watching someone get sandwiched by my spikes next to me. Absolutely love tricking out my hallway into my living room with enough axes until it’s practically impossible.
